title: Lab note · What changes when you deploy the same system to three clients.
dek: The voice copilot architecture is the same in all three plants. Almost nothing else is.

children.text: Same backend. Same agents. Three completely different plant environments. The bits that changed between clients weren’t the AI — they were the data tools, the access boundaries, the language each plant used for its own KPIs, and the noise profile of each floor.
The architectural decision that paid off was treating client-specific behaviour as typed tools, not as prompt variation. Tools are testable. Prompts are weather.
